chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Special Customs Reference Applications 125 & 126 of 2019 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case 2. For order on CMA No.1001/2019 09.10.2025 Dr. Imtiaz Ali advocate holds brief for Dr. Shahnawaz Memon, advocate for the applicant These reference applications are pending since 2019 without any progress. On 16.11.2020, counsel was required to reframe questions of law. No compliance is apparent from the record. Today, brief is being held for applicant’s counsel and adjournment is being sought for no cogent reason whatsoever. These matters are pending for six years without any progress and no case is articulated to perpetuate the same. In view of judgment of the Supreme Court in the case of C.I.R. vs. Rafeh Limited reported as PLD 2020 SC 518, these reference applications are dismissed for non- prosecution. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Customs Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 196 of the Customs Act, 1969. Office is instructed to place copy of this order in connected matter. Judge Judge Amjad
